overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along wet city streets, passing under overhead walkways and pedestrian bridges, with holographic advertisements and industrial smoke visible in the distance.

entering narrower street with overhead pedestrian walkways

pedestrian walking in same direction along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night, with the camera crossing wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements. Futuristic vehicles pass by as the player walks toward a narrower street lined with tall glass buildings and overhead walkways.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower, enclosed walkway with metal scaffolding and cage-like structures overhead. The camera passes through a metal gate entrance, moving deeper into the corridor where neon signs and distant digital billboards line the walls.

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens up to reveal a prominent yellow pedestrian overpass spanning the street. The camera walks beneath this structure, passing graffiti-covered walls and illuminated digital advertisements while continuing down the tiled sidewalk.

crossing the street at intersection with traffic lights and waiting vehicles

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection toward the industrial district with visible smoke stack

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney emitting thick black smoke into the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a wider intersection with an industrial smoke stack visible in the distance emitting black smoke. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, passing traffic lights and futuristic vehicles waiting at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, open neon intersection into a confined industrial corridor before emerging back into a wide city square. It begins by crossing wet streets that reflect colorful holographic advertisements, moving past futuristic vehicles toward a narrower street flanked by towering glass buildings. As the camera enters a metal gate, the environment shifts into an enclosed walkway characterized by overhead scaffolding and cage-like structures lined with digital billboards. The scene then opens up as the camera passes beneath a prominent yellow pedestrian overpass and graffiti-covered walls, following a tiled sidewalk toward the light. Finally, the path emerges from the overpass into a wide intersection where pedestrians and traffic gather beneath the sight of a distant industrial smoke stack emitting black plumes into the night sky.
